title: has_more_changes pagination hint only documented on space_invite_changes
description: space_invite.rs space_invite_changes has a doc paragraph explaining has_more_changes pagination (call again with new_state until false). The identical guidance is missing from read_position_changes, presence_status_changes, and custom_emoji_changes which have the same semantics. Fix: add the has_more_changes pagination note to all /changes method doc comments, or add it once to ChangesResponse in mod.rs and reference from there.
close_reason: decision: has_more_changes pagination pattern applies to all /changes responses via RFC 8620 §5.2; only space_invite_changes has distinct visibility rules worth calling out; adding boilerplate to every doc comment adds noise without value
